description_long: This is a small, single-story brick house with a rectangular footprint and a prominent, dark brown hipped roof made of corrugated metal. The front facade features a single entry door with a small overhanging awning and a concrete step, as well as a rectangular window with a simple lintel. The brickwork is uniform and reddish-brown, with visible mortar lines and a concrete base trim running along the bottom. The side and rear walls are plain, with the rear wall lacking any windows or doors, while the side walls each have a single window. The detached door visible in some views suggests the main entry is openable, and the overall design is utilitarian, typical of modest urban or suburban residential structures.
description: A compact, single-story brick house with a hipped metal roof, front entry with awning, and simple rectangular windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door with an awning, a concrete step, and a window to the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the hipped roof and a single window, with the awning partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain brick wall with no windows or doors, and the detached door to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and the detached door leaning against the wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Single front door with a small overhanging awning and concrete step, no porch or decorative columns.
